codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the prior blocking contract overreach without introducing new blocking issues. `src/resources/containers.rs:286-290` adds a dedicated `ContainerReadNetworkPolicy`, and `src/resources/containers.rs:447-449` narrows `Container.network_policy` to that read-only shape so retrieve/list decoding no longer asserts request-only `domain_secrets`, `file_ids`, or `skills`. The updated contract test still proves create-time request shaping for those inputs at `tests/containers_contract.rs:34-45` and `:113-123`, while the mocked read fixture now only requires the documented read fields at `tests/containers_contract.rs:56-78` and `:277-280`. The fix commit only changes `src/resources/containers.rs` and `tests/containers_contract.rs`, so the previously reviewed container-file runtime and entitlement-aware live proof remain intact.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed containers feature together with the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit `755162eea8fcf2cd489bf3a13aff58be4ecf876d`. The rerun passes: it narrows the Containers read contract to documented fields, preserves create-time request shaping for `file_ids`, inline/reference `skills`, and allowlist `domain_secrets`, and does not introduce any new blocking issues in the existing container-file surface or live proof.
